sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81633" key="peri/lalos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίλᾰλ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n81633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very talkative</tr_>, Suid.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κομψόν</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
